leviathan_payoff.title: Use all T.O. Magic (traveloptics:) spells unlocked from the Leviathan materials in Ch11

void_school_max.title: Max out the Void/Ender school ISS spells — equip the highest tier Eldritch spells available

subtitle.text: T.O. Magic is an ISS addon, not a travel mod. The namespace is traveloptics: — the spells are void-school payoffs.

description: CH.17 · T.O. MAGIC PAYOFF
▸ T.O. Magic (traveloptics: namespace) is an ISS addon.',
Common confusion: the name sounds like a travel mod.',
It is not. It is a magic mod that extends ISS.',
Its spells are unlocked through Leviathan kill materials (Ch11)',
and are the highest tier void/ender school spells in the pack.',
◈ T.O. MAGIC SPELL ACCESS
└ Leviathan materials (Ch11): dropped items feed into',
traveloptics: spell scroll recipes (check JEI: traveloptics:)',
└ Spell tier: above base ISS school maximum',
└ Key spells: void-school damage types, dimensional manipulation,',
extended range attacks',
└ Abyssal Beam: primary T.O. Magic payoff (see Archmage quest)',
└ Secondary spells: check JEI for full traveloptics: spell list',
◈ VOID/ENDER SCHOOL MAXIMIZATION
└ ISS Eldritch school base spells: available since Ch09',
└ T.O. Magic adds extensions above the base school ceiling',
└ Full loadout: base Eldritch spells + T.O. Magic extensions',
└ Ring of Mana: required for sustained void casting',
(T.O. Magic spells have high mana cost)',
└ Mana regeneration: Eldritch focus + Ring of Mana + skill tree',
(Ch15 Puffish Magic skill tree should be maxed by now)',
◈ AGAINST CH17 ENDGAME
└ T.O. Magic spells vs Ch17 content:',
Any remaining Cataclysm mobs (void type) → full void bonus',
Any divine/PTD boss encounters → mixed damage types',
Nuclear test witnesses → fire resistance + void beam',
└ Combine with ISS Blood school for sustain during long fights',
▸ The Leviathan was a deep-ocean creature.',
It lived in a place where void and ocean overlap.',
The magic it carried was neither fully ocean nor fully void.',
T.O. Magic bottled that overlap.',
The spells are the overlap applied.',
You killed the Leviathan in Ch11.',
The spell is the reason why it mattered.',
▶ Use all T.O. Magic spells from Leviathan materials [check]
▶ Max out the Void/Ender ISS school loadout [check]
◇ For other ISS addon mods in the pack:',
check JEI filtered by school-adjacent namespaces.',
T.O. Magic (traveloptics:) is the primary confirmed addon.',
Others may exist — the Leviathan is not the only boss',
that drops ISS school materials.
